title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indo-Tibetan Border Police Force Act, 1992. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification, appoint.
footnote: 1. 30th May, 1994, vide notification No. S.O. 414(E), dated 28th May, 1994, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
